/* packet3_aprs_packet */
/* src=YO0FLP dst=W0RLDT */
static const uint8_t packet3_aprs_packet_frame[] = { 0xAE, 0x60, 0xA4, 0x98, 0x88, 0xA8, 0x60, 0xB2, 0x9E, 0x60, 0x8C, 0x98, 0xA0, 0x61, 0x03, 0xF0, 0x3E, 0x48, 0x65, 0x6C, 0x6C, 0x6F, 0x20, 0x77, 0x6F, 0x72, 0x6C, 0x64, 0x2C, 0x20, 0x49, 0x20, 0x61, 0x6D, 0x20, 0x46, 0x6C, 0x69, 0x70, 0x70, 0x65, 0x72, 0x20, 0x5A, 0x65, 0x72, 0x6F, 0x20, 0x3A, 0x44, 0x6B, 0x11 };

static const bool packet3_aprs_packet_start_level = false;
